items.headline: Butters umpire abuse charge thrown out by appeals board
items.description: Port Adelaide superstar Zak Butters has had his umpire abuse charge thrown out by the AFL appeals board after it was ruled a panel member's decision to listen to the original tribunal hearing from his car was a "miscarriage of justice".

items.headline: Erling Haaland's partner 'isn't happy' with the scratches left on his body by Premier defenders
items.description: Erling Haaland has joked that his partner "isn't happy" about the number of scratches on his body after the physical battles with Premier League defenders.

items.headline: Critics on new rules and regulations have 'short memories,' says F1 boss
items.description: Critics of Formula 1's new style of racing and its controversial new cars have "short memories", according to championship CEO Stefano Domenicali.

items.headline: England 2026 World Cup watch: Who's trending up, who's trending down as Thomas Tuchel mulls squad
items.description: Who is trending up? Who is trending down? ESPN look at some major contenders for Thomas Tuchel's England World Cup squad.

items.headline: Munster to fight way out of slump as Origin looms
items.description: Queensland captain Cameron Munster admits he has to stop trying too hard as he seeks to turn around his sub-par form in time to repeat his State Of Origin heroics.

items.headline: Maryland's Okananwa leads D'Tigress refresh as Nigeria call up NCAA talent to face WNBA
items.description: Maryland Terrapins star Oluchi Okananwa is top of the list on the Nigeria women's basketball team, as they named a 21-player training camp roster ahead of a series of friendlies against WNBA opposition.

items.headline: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
items.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

items.headline: Blues leave door open for new faces as Haas ruled out
items.description: NSW coach Laurie Daley will leave the selection door wide open as he seeks to fill the massive shoes of front-rower Payne Haas in the State of Origin series opener.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona step up interest in Italy right back
items.description: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

items.headline: Vegas brings 1-0 series lead into game 2 against Utah
items.description: Utah Mammoth (43-33-6, in the Central Division) vs. Vegas Golden Knights (39-26-17, in the Pacific Division)

items.headline: Avalanche take 1-0 series lead into game 2 against the Kings
items.description: Los Angeles Kings (35-27-20, in the Pacific Division) vs. Colorado Avalanche (55-16-11, in the Central Division)

items.headline: Montreal visits Tampa Bay with 1-0 series lead
items.description: Montreal Canadiens (48-24-10, in the Atlantic Division) vs. Tampa Bay Lightning (50-26-6, in the Atlantic Division)

items.headline: Buffalo hosts Boston with 1-0 series lead
items.description: Boston Bruins (45-27-10, in the Atlantic Division) vs. Buffalo Sabres (50-23-9, in the Atlantic Division)

items.headline: Royals to stop slide in matchup with the Orioles
items.description: Baltimore Orioles (10-12, third in the AL East) vs. Kansas City Royals (7-15, fifth in the AL Central)

items.headline: Astros bring road skid into matchup with the Guardians
items.description: Houston Astros (8-15, fifth in the AL West) vs. Cleveland Guardians (13-10, first in the AL Central)
